message:
revert(tldr): restore direct imports for section components

Reverted lazy loading changes from previous commit. Returned to direct
imports for TldrToolGrid and TldrSectionNav components rather than
dynamic imports. Removed duplicate LazyTldrToolGrid rendering.

This addresses potential hydration issues and simplifies the component
tree while the proper lazy loading strategy is evaluated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
